seo.defaultDescription: Portfolio featuring experience, projects, skills, and contact information for Siddharth Kumar.

profile.name: Siddharth Kumar
profile.tagline: Engineering manufacturable systems from concept to production.
profile.shortBio: Engineer focused on designing manufacturable products and optimizing production systems. Combines CAD, simulation, and hands-on manufacturing expertise to transform concepts into scalable solutions.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I am a engineer focused on designing and delivering practical, manufacturable engineering solutions. My work sits at the intersection of design, simulation, and production engineering, where I translate ideas into systems that can be reliably built and scaled. I enjoy tackling complex engineering challenges; from developing CAD models and performing structural simulations to optimizing CNC processes and improving shop-floor workflows. At IPA Private Limited, I have worked on initiatives that significantly increased manufacturing output, improved calibration accuracy, and enhanced production efficiency through fixture design, tool-path optimization, and data-driven process improvements.

My background includes an M.S. in Engineering from the University of Texas at Dallas and a B.Tech from VIT Vellore, which shaped my interest in combining analytical engineering methods with hands-on problem solving. I am particularly interested in product development, advanced manufacturing, robotics, and intelligent systems, where thoughtful design and engineering rigor can turn complex ideas into reliable real-world products.

bullets: Perform CAD and CAM work supporting critical part modeling, fixture design, DFM reviews, and CNC tool-path optimization.
Act as the primary technical interface for manufacturing issues, design changes, and process improvements related to transducer systems.
Evaluate machining processes and inspection practices during supplier visits, verifying adherence to engineering drawings and GD&T requirements.
Support continuous improvement initiatives to improve manufacturability, production reliability, and process efficiency.
Lead the continued development and decentralization of the machine shop to enable scalable manufacturing operations.
Manage vendor sourcing, RFQ evaluation, technical capability assessment, and supplier selection.
Conduct price negotiations with machining, tooling, and fabrication vendors while balancing cost, quality, and delivery requirements.
Coordinate day-to-day operations of the transducer production line, including work-order prioritization and cross-functional alignment with quality and procurement teams.
Support organizational quality systems as a Certified ISO Internal Auditor, assisting with internal audits, compliance reviews, and corrective actions.
Collaborated with CAM specialists to redesign CNC toolpaths, reducing cycle time by 50% and increasing projected monthly output from 500 to 1,500 parts.
Validated CNC programs directly on the shop floor, documenting setup sheets, tooling parameters, and machining conditions to ensure production readiness.
Developed a data-driven production dashboard in Excel to track machine runtime, downtime, tool life, and output metrics, enabling data-informed engineering decisions.
Conducted capability assessments for 12 machine shop operators, mapping skill levels to job requirements.
Rebalanced task assignments to align operator expertise with setup complexity, increasing shop throughput by 15%.
Led a cross-functional initiative with technicians and an external consultant to redesign the machine shop management framework.
Calibrated a Universal Testing Machine (UTM) using staged dead-weight loading to validate load cell performance across multiple load conditions.
Identified load distribution discrepancies and proposed structural design modifications that improved calibration accuracy by 15%.
Designed custom jigs and structural supports to improve testing efficiency by 25% and increase laser engraving throughput by 50%.
Led the development of a comprehensive robotics curriculum for middle school students, covering topics from basic mechanics to advanced programming.
Designed hands-on projects and activities using LEGO Robotics that engaged students in building and programming their own robots, fostering creativity and problem-solving skills.
Designed and developed a package mounting system using SolidWorks and Fusion 360, achieving a 15% reduction in material usage and 25% increase in load capacity.
Conducted FEA and structural analysis with ANSYS, improving prototype durability by 20%.
Reduced design-to-prototype lead time by 30% through modular design implementation.

projects.title: Custom Numpad Design
projects.description: A custom-designed numpad with programmable keys, slider and knob, designed using Fusion 360 and kiCAD.

projects.title: Transducer Database
projects.description: A custom built internal database designed and developed to track all loadcells that go through Transducer Dept.

projects.title: Water Level Automation
projects.description: A water level monitoring and control system with a robust app implemented at home. (WIP)

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: This very website! Built from scratch using Astro, Lucide and hosted on Netlify.

contact.heading: Get Back to Me
contact.description: Tell me about your need and share your contact details. I will follow up as soon as possible.
contact.privacyNote: Your details are used only to reply to your inquiry and are never shared with third parties.
